channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Uber Expands App with Hotels and Shopping Features to Become a U.S. Super App
item.description: Uber is accelerating its push to transform from a ride-hailing platform into a comprehensive super app in the U.S., following trends seen in Asia. At its recent GO-GET event in New York, Uber announce...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi shares light moment with investment advisor while emphasising professional respect
item.description: On May 10, 2026, Rahul Gandhi shared a light-hearted interaction with his mutual fund advisor, Muthukrishnan Dhandapani, on X (formerly Twitter). Dhandapani, who openly supported the BJP between 2014 ...

item.title: Khaled Sabsabi represents Australia at the 61st Venice Biennale with two major installations
item.description: Khaled Sabsabi, a Lebanese-born Australian artist and former child refugee, is set to present his most ambitious works to date at the 61st Venice Biennale. Representing Australia alongside curator Mic...

item.title: GM Settles for $12.75M After Selling California Drivers’ Data Without Consent
item.description: General Motors (GM) has agreed to a $12.75 million settlement with California authorities after it was revealed that the company sold personal driving data of Californians without their consent. Accor...

item.title: Cheruiyot Signals Rift Valley Support for Mudavadi in 2032 Presidential Bid
item.description: During a Sunday Holy Mass at St Peter's Cathedral in Kapsabet, Nandi County, Senate Majority Leader Aaron Cheruiyot hinted that Prime Cabinet Secretary Musalia Mudavadi could succeed President William...

item.title: Sky News Personal Finance Updates
item.description: The article titled 'Money Newsletter: Sky News Personal Finance' appears to focus on personal finance advice, investment insights, and updates relevant to managing money in the UK. Although the full c...

item.title: NLNG Funds Transfer to Imo Governor Sparks Controversy Within Governors' Forum
item.description: Sources don talk say wahala don start wen Imo State Governor Hope Uzodimma allegedly inform other governors say the NLNG money wey dem give am don already finish. E be like say the money, wey na from ...

item.title: FUTA Student Found Dead Near Off-Campus Residence, Investigation Underway
item.description: Panic don tey grip Federal University of Technology, Akure (FUTA) as dem find the body of 23-year-old student, Favour Olaniyi, for bush near him off-campus residence. Favour wey dey study Surveying an...

item.title: Report suggests Western Australia likely to miss 2050 net zero target regardless of Browse project
item.description: A report commissioned by Woodside Energy indicates that Western Australia is unlikely to meet its 2050 net zero emissions target, even if the controversial $30 billion Browse gas project does not proc...

item.title: Arsenal defeat West Ham 1-0 as controversial VAR decision denies hosts late equaliser
item.description: Arsenal secured a vital 1-0 victory over West Ham United in a tense Premier League match that could have significant implications for both the title race and the relegation battle. The game was decide...

item.title: NRL clubs seek discussion before granting salary cap relief to Perth Bears
item.description: NRL clubs are voicing concerns over potential salary cap concessions for the new Perth Bears team ahead of their 2027 debut. Existing teams argue that providing the Bears with any special financial ad...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs secure late 2-0 win over Sekhukhune to clinch third place
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs confirmed their third-place finish in the Premier Soccer League following a late 2-0 win over Sekhukhune United at Peter Mokaba Stadium. Tashreeq Morris, making his first appearance this...

item.title: Governor Zulum Visit Bama, Announce Relief for Victims After Windstorm Kill 4 in Borno
item.description: Borno State Governor, Professor Babagana Umara Zulum, don visit Bama town to show sympathy to the victims wey one strong windstorm affect badly. According to the Chairman of Bama Local Government, at ...

item.title: BARMM Chief Minister Abdulrauf Macacua Runs for Regional Parliament as Independent
item.description: Abdulrauf Macacua, the chief minister of the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM), has officially filed his certificate of candidacy to run in the upcoming BARMM parliamentary elect...

item.title: Women’s Work Songs as Records of Environmental Change
item.description: In rural India, women’s work songs have historically carried more than just rhythm—they have been informal records of environmental change. Songs sung while grinding grain or working in fields capture...

item.title: Judicial Orders Without Published Judgments Fuel Confusion and Political Bias in Nigeria
item.description: For Nigeria, matter don reach where court verdicts dey handed out but no proper judgment dey attached. Dis wahala dey happen especially for cases wey involve politics. People dey wonder whether na car...

item.title: Canberra Auction Market Dominated by Homes Under $1 Million
item.description: Properties priced under $1 million continue to be the mainstay of Canberra's auction market, drawing strong interest from first-home buyers and downsizers. Many homes are now being sold prior to aucti...

item.title: Passengers evacuated worldwide after hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship near Tenerife
item.description: Passengers and crew from a cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak were evacuated from Tenerife and sent back to their home countries under strict health protocols. Special government-arranged f...

item.title: Toronto HR Manager Buys First Condo Amid Buyer’s Market
item.description: Melissa, a 41-year-old senior HR manager in Toronto, purchased her first home in May: a one-bedroom-plus-den condo for $520,000. The roughly 700-square-foot unit met her essential requirements for spa...

item.title: DSWD schedules P5,000 cash aid distribution for Grab and Move It drivers in Metro Manila
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) will conduct a special cash payout of ₱5,000 for transport network vehicle service (TNVS) drivers and motorcycle taxi riders in Metro Manila who...
